---
title: 'Start Here'
date: '2017-08-31T02:43:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Topos Men'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '1102713204010279687'
blogger_filename: '/p/a-darrellwolfe.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Topos Men/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<h4>
So why are you here?</h4>
<i><br /></i> <i>Let me tell you why you're here. You're here because you know something. What you know you can't explain, but you feel it. You've felt it your entire life, that there's something wrong with the world. You don't know what it is, but it's there, like a splinter in your mind, driving you mad. It is this feeling that has brought you to me. Do you know what I'm talking about?&nbsp;<a href="http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0133093/quotes">Morpheus (The Matrix)</a></i><br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Spiritual Realities</h4>
<br />
We go through life. We work, pay bills, eat, sleep, and if we're lucky, we play a little. But whether you are a PhD Neurosurgeon, a Walmart Cashier, a Cop, a Robber, a Mill Worker, a Business Owner. or an Entrepreneur...<br />
<i><br /></i> <i>We were meant for so much more!</i>&nbsp;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iOTcr9wKC-o">Meant To Live (Switchfoot)</a><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Your Topos</h4>
<br />
Topos is a Greek word. When paraphrased it means:<br />
<br />
<i><b>Your strategic position of opportunity and influence.</b></i><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
The Topos Men</h4>
<br />
Topos men are men who want to go deeper. Find the meaning beneath the mundane. We meet online in the Facebook group (<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/ToposMen/">here</a>) and occasionally in person. If you live in the Coeur d'Alene, Idaho region, come join us (<i>men only</i>)&nbsp;for a time for bible study, group discussion, and connection with like-minded men.<br />
<br />
Your strategic position of opportunity and influence is waiting for you to step up and be a Man of God.&nbsp;Facecbook&nbsp;Group (<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/ToposMen/">here</a>).<br />
<br />
If you'd like to meet in Coeur d'Alene, ID; I'm gathering interest and then I'll set up a Facebook event once I have a plan/schedule. To be added to the interest list, email me (<a href="mailto:ToposMen@groups.facebook.com" style="background-color: white; color: #365899; cursor: pointer; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px;">ToposMen@groups.facebook.com</a>).<br />
<br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20170811-100349538-burst000-cover-top-946ab1e0b322.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20170811-100349538-burst000-cover-top-6e80f89f1edd.jpg" width="150" /></a><br />
<br />
<br />
My name is Darrell Wolfe, I hope you'll join me on this adventure.<br />
<br />
A DarrellWolfe.com blog.<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrellwolfedotcom-4-500-social-6221beb1d53d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; display: inline !important; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-align: center;"><img border="0" data-original-height="634" data-original-width="860" height="235" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrellwolfedotcom-4-500-social-a0fe8d0b57eb.jpg" width="320" /></a><br />
<br />
